introSection: Cedar Creek Mine Ride is a steel hybrid roller coaster located at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA. It is the second oldest operating roller coaster in the park, with the oldest being Blue Streak. The ride was built by American firm Arrow Development and opened on May 24, 1969.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On May 24, 1969, Cedar Creek Mine Ride officially opened to the public.

In 2019, Cedar Creek Mine Ride celebrated its 50th anniversary. That year, the attraction received some changes, including a new station soundtrack, special effects in the first tunnel, and mineshaft scenery in the queue.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On May 24, 1984, a 5-year-old boy suffered a fractured skull and bruises after falling from the train's front seat during its drop. The ride originally had a height restriction of when it opened in 1969, but this was later relaxed to  or accompanied by a parent, so the boy may have been too small to ride. After the incident, the park reinstated the original restriction of and modified the lap bars.

fullText:
Cedar Creek Mine Ride is a steel hybrid roller coaster located at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA. It is the second oldest operating roller coaster in the park, with the oldest being Blue Streak. The ride was built by American firm Arrow Development and opened on May 24, 1969.

On May 24, 1969, Cedar Creek Mine Ride officially opened to the public.

In 2019, Cedar Creek Mine Ride celebrated its 50th anniversary. That year, the attraction received some changes, including a new station soundtrack, special effects in the first tunnel, and mineshaft scenery in the queue.



Black track and unpainted supports.



On May 24, 1984, a 5-year-old boy suffered a fractured skull and bruises after falling from the train's front seat during its drop. The ride originally had a height restriction of when it opened in 1969, but this was later relaxed to  or accompanied by a parent, so the boy may have been too small to ride. After the incident, the park reinstated the original restriction of and modified the lap bars.
